# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 7 symbols 4 orders 60 max_qty 8 max_notional 1000000
cmd reg S0
cmd reg S1
cmd reg S2
cmd reg S3
cmd limit 0 1 B 98 11 GTC
reject new_limit 1 MaxQuantityExceeded

evt accept 1 3 2
cmd market 3 3 S 3
evt accept 2 3 3

reject new_limit 4 MaxQuantityExceeded

evt accept 7 3 9

reject cancel 1 UnknownOrder
